title: The Lost Key

segments.text: When Daniel got home from work, he reached into his pocket for his key.
He retraced his steps to the bus stop, then to the café where he had bought coffee.
“Are you looking for this?” she asked, holding up a small silver key.
He had left it on the counter next to his cup.
He thanked her and walked home in the warm afternoon light.

transcript: When Daniel got home from work, he reached into his pocket for his key. It wasn't there. He checked his bag. Nothing. He retraced his steps to the bus stop, then to the café where he had bought coffee. The barista smiled. “Are you looking for this?” she asked, holding up a small silver key. Daniel laughed with relief. He had left it on the counter next to his cup. He thanked her and walked home in the warm afternoon light.
